name: SAP Business One
shortDescription: Automate your SAP Business One ERP through the OData Service Layer. Manage business partners, items, warehouses, and price lists; run the full sales and purchasing document lifecycle (quotations, orders, deliveries, invoices, credit memos, returns); apply incoming and outgoing payments; post inventory movements and journal entries; and log CRM activities. Authentication uses a Service Layer session login (Base URL, Company DB, Username, Password) with the connection cookie reused and refreshed automatically. Includes a generic OData query passthrough and polling triggers for new records.

actions.name: Create Business Partner
actions.description: Create a customer, vendor/supplier, or lead in SAP Business One. Use this to add a new trading partner before raising a sales or purchasing document for them.

actions.name: Get Business Partner
actions.description: Retrieve one business partner by its code, including contact and address details.

actions.name: List Business Partners
actions.description: List or search business partners, optionally filtered by type (Customer/Vendor/Lead). Returns all matching rows by following pagination automatically.

actions.name: Update Business Partner
actions.description: Update fields on an existing business partner. Only the fields you supply change (PATCH semantics).

actions.name: Delete Business Partner
actions.description: Delete a business partner. Fails if the partner has posted transactions (SAP returns -5006).

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Add a contact person to a business partner. Contacts are managed as the partner's ContactEmployees collection, so this patches the partner with a new contact.

actions.name: Get Contacts
actions.description: Retrieve the contact persons (ContactEmployees) of a business partner.

actions.name: List Contacts
actions.description: List business partners together with their contact persons. Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Update a contact person on a business partner by its internal code (PATCH of the ContactEmployees collection).

actions.name: Create Item
actions.description: Create an inventory/sales/purchase item (product) master record. Use before adding the item to documents.

actions.name: Get Item
actions.description: Retrieve one item including price and per-warehouse stock (ItemWarehouseInfoCollection).

actions.name: List Items
actions.description: List or search items. Follows pagination to return all matches.

actions.name: Update Item
actions.description: Update fields on an existing item (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Delete Item
actions.description: Delete an item. Fails (-5006) if the item is used in transactions.

actions.name: Create Warehouse
actions.description: Create a warehouse (stock location).

actions.name: Get Warehouse
actions.description: Retrieve one warehouse by its code.

actions.name: List Warehouses
actions.description: List or search warehouses. Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Update Warehouse
actions.description: Update a warehouse's name (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Get Price List
actions.description: Retrieve one price list by its number, including its item prices.

actions.name: List Price Lists
actions.description: List all price lists. Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Update Price List
actions.description: Update a price list's name or factor (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Create Quotation
actions.description: Create a sales quotation for a customer with line items. Use to send a price proposal before the customer commits to an order.

actions.name: Get Quotation
actions.description: Retrieve a sales quotation by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Quotations
actions.description: List or search sales quotations by customer and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update Quotation
actions.description: Update a sales quotation's header fields (PATCH).

actions.name: Close Quotation
actions.description: Close a sales quotation (bound Close action) so it no longer appears as open.

actions.name: Create Order
actions.description: Create a sales order for a customer with one or more line items. Use after the quotation stage to commit the sale; it feeds delivery and invoicing.

actions.name: Get Order
actions.description: Retrieve a sales order by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Orders
actions.description: List or search sales orders. Filter by customer and/or status; follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update Order
actions.description: Update a sales order's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Close Order
actions.description: Close a sales order (bound Close action) so it no longer appears as open.

actions.name: Cancel Order
actions.description: Cancel a sales order (bound Cancel action). Use to void an order that should not be fulfilled.

actions.name: Create Delivery Note
actions.description: Create a delivery note (goods shipped to a customer) with line items. Use to record fulfillment of a sales order.

actions.name: Get Delivery Note
actions.description: Retrieve a delivery note by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Delivery Notes
actions.description: List or search delivery notes by customer and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update Delivery Note
actions.description: Update a delivery note's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Close Delivery Note
actions.description: Close a delivery note (bound Close action).

actions.name: Create A/R Invoice
actions.description: Create a customer (A/R) invoice with line items. Use to bill a customer for goods or services.

actions.name: Get A/R Invoice
actions.description: Retrieve a customer (A/R) invoice by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List A/R Invoices
actions.description: List or search customer (A/R) invoices by customer and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update A/R Invoice
actions.description: Update a customer (A/R) invoice's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Cancel A/R Invoice
actions.description: Cancel a customer (A/R) invoice (bound Cancel action). Creates a cancellation document.

actions.name: Create A/R Credit Memo
actions.description: Create a customer (A/R) credit memo with line items. Use to credit a customer for returned goods or a billing correction.

actions.name: Get A/R Credit Memo
actions.description: Retrieve a customer (A/R) credit memo by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List A/R Credit Memos
actions.description: List or search customer (A/R) credit memos by customer and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update A/R Credit Memo
actions.description: Update a customer (A/R) credit memo's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Cancel A/R Credit Memo
actions.description: Cancel a customer (A/R) credit memo (bound Cancel action).

actions.name: Create Return
actions.description: Create a sales return (customer sends goods back) with line items.

actions.name: Get Return
actions.description: Retrieve a sales return by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Returns
actions.description: List or search sales returns by customer and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update Return
actions.description: Update a sales return's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Create Purchase Quotation
actions.description: Create a purchase quotation request to a vendor with line items. Use to solicit a vendor price before raising a purchase order.

actions.name: Get Purchase Quotation
actions.description: Retrieve a purchase quotation by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Purchase Quotations
actions.description: List or search purchase quotations by vendor and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update Purchase Quotation
actions.description: Update a purchase quotation's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Close Purchase Quotation
actions.description: Close a purchase quotation (bound Close action).

actions.name: Create Purchase Order
actions.description: Create a purchase order to a vendor with line items. Use to procure stock or services.

actions.name: Get Purchase Order
actions.description: Retrieve a purchase order by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Purchase Orders
actions.description: List or search purchase orders by vendor and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update Purchase Order
actions.description: Update a purchase order's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Close Purchase Order
actions.description: Close a purchase order (bound Close action).

actions.name: Cancel Purchase Order
actions.description: Cancel a purchase order (bound Cancel action). Use to void a PO that should not be fulfilled.

actions.name: Create Goods Receipt PO
actions.description: Create a goods receipt PO (record receipt of purchased goods) with line items. Use to receive stock against a purchase order.

actions.name: Get Goods Receipt PO
actions.description: Retrieve a goods receipt PO by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Goods Receipt POs
actions.description: List or search goods receipt POs by vendor and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update Goods Receipt PO
actions.description: Update a goods receipt PO's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Create A/P Invoice
actions.description: Create a vendor (A/P) invoice with line items. Use to record a bill from a vendor.

actions.name: Get A/P Invoice
actions.description: Retrieve a vendor (A/P) invoice by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List A/P Invoices
actions.description: List or search vendor (A/P) invoices by vendor and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update A/P Invoice
actions.description: Update a vendor (A/P) invoice's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change). Note: A/P invoices cannot be cancelled via Service Layer.

actions.name: Create A/P Credit Memo
actions.description: Create a vendor (A/P) credit memo with line items. Use to record a credit from a vendor for returned goods or a billing correction.

actions.name: Get A/P Credit Memo
actions.description: Retrieve a vendor (A/P) credit memo by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List A/P Credit Memos
actions.description: List or search vendor (A/P) credit memos by vendor and/or status. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Update A/P Credit Memo
actions.description: Update a vendor (A/P) credit memo's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Create Incoming Payment
actions.description: Record a customer payment against one or more A/R invoices. Use to apply received cash, transfer, or check to open invoices.

actions.name: Get Incoming Payment
actions.description: Retrieve an incoming (customer) payment by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Incoming Payments
actions.description: List or search incoming (customer) payments by customer. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Cancel Incoming Payment
actions.description: Cancel an incoming (customer) payment (bound Cancel action). Posted payments cannot be edited or deleted, only cancelled.

actions.name: Create Outgoing Payment
actions.description: Record a payment to a vendor against one or more A/P invoices. Use to apply cash, transfer, or check to open vendor bills.

actions.name: Get Outgoing Payment
actions.description: Retrieve an outgoing (vendor) payment by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Outgoing Payments
actions.description: List or search outgoing (vendor) payments by vendor. Follows pagination for all rows.

actions.name: Cancel Outgoing Payment
actions.description: Cancel an outgoing (vendor) payment (bound Cancel action). Posted payments cannot be edited or deleted, only cancelled.

actions.name: Create Stock Transfer
actions.description: Move stock between warehouses with line items. Use to rebalance inventory across locations.

actions.name: Get Stock Transfer
actions.description: Retrieve a stock transfer by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Stock Transfers
actions.description: List stock transfers. Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Update Stock Transfer
actions.description: Update a stock transfer's header fields (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Create Goods Issue
actions.description: Post a goods issue (remove stock from inventory, e.g. for scrap or internal use) with line items. Posted documents cannot be edited or deleted.

actions.name: Get Goods Issue
actions.description: Retrieve a goods issue by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Goods Issues
actions.description: List goods issues. Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Create Goods Receipt
actions.description: Post a goods receipt (add stock to inventory, e.g. for production or found stock) with line items. Posted documents cannot be edited or deleted.

actions.name: Get Goods Receipt
actions.description: Retrieve a goods receipt by its internal DocEntry.

actions.name: List Goods Receipts
actions.description: List goods receipts. Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Create Journal Entry
actions.description: Post a manual G/L journal entry with balanced debit/credit lines. Use for adjustments and accruals.

actions.name: Get Journal Entry
actions.description: Retrieve a journal entry by its number (JdtNum).

actions.name: List Journal Entries
actions.description: List journal entries. Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Update Journal Entry
actions.description: Update a journal entry's memo or reference (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Get Account
actions.description: Retrieve a single G/L account from the chart of accounts by its code.

actions.name: List Accounts
actions.description: List or search G/L accounts (chart of accounts). Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Create Activity
actions.description: Create a CRM activity (call, meeting, task, note) linked to a business partner. Use to log customer interactions and follow-ups.

actions.name: Get Activity
actions.description: Retrieve a CRM activity by its ActivityCode.

actions.name: List Activities
actions.description: List or search CRM activities by business partner. Follows pagination to return all rows.

actions.name: Update Activity
actions.description: Update a CRM activity's notes (PATCH; only supplied fields change).

actions.name: Delete Activity
actions.description: Delete a CRM activity by its ActivityCode.

actions.name: Query Entities
actions.description: Run an advanced OData query against any Service Layer entity set with filter/select/sort. Returns ALL matching rows (follows pagination automatically). Use when no dedicated action fits.

idealUseCases: Syncing customers, vendors, and leads between SAP Business One and your CRM or storefront
Raising sales quotations, orders, deliveries, and A/R invoices from web forms or other apps
Driving the purchasing cycle: purchase quotations, orders, goods receipt POs, and A/P invoices
Applying customer and vendor payments against open invoices and reconciling balances
Keeping item, warehouse, and price-list master data in sync with other systems
Posting journal entries and inventory movements (stock transfers, goods issue/receipt)
Logging CRM activities (calls, meetings, tasks, notes) against business partners
Running ad-hoc OData queries against any Service Layer entity when no dedicated action fits
Kicking off workflows the moment a new sales order or business partner is created
agentIdeas: When the SAP Business One **"On New Sales Order"** trigger fires, use Gmail **"Send Message"** to notify the fulfilment team and add the order to Google Sheets **"Add Row"** for reporting.
Use Google Sheets **"Get Rows"** to read a list of new customers, then call SAP Business One **"Create Business Partner"** and **"Create Quotation"** to seed them into the ERP.

When the SAP Business One **"On New Business Partner"** trigger fires, call HubSpot **"Create Contact"** to mirror the account into your CRM and post Slack **"Send Message To Channel"** to alert the sales team.
